pages.text: The Slime Milker squeezes a captured Slime Bucket into a bucket of that resource's Slime Milk. Feed it Slime Buckets, take out milk - the bottled, pipeable form of a slime supply.

The Slime Churn is the Milker's inverse: pour Slime Milk and empty buckets in, get captured Slime Buckets out, on the same spawn economy a placed source uses. Together they let you store a slime supply as a fluid and pour it out as slimes on demand.
